entries.title: Chirality — The Arc's Handedness
entries.description: Whether the CW arc's preparation (negative) and execution (positive) surfaces are mirror-symmetric or dominant one way — right-handed, left-handed, or achiral sessions, and the three-session reversal sequence.

entries.title: Dealer Field Architecture (Apex Dealer Logic Book, Sections I–II)
entries.description: The Intent/Transaction/Realization three-tier structure, the Puts-Minus-Calls sign convention, unified signal thresholds, the Liquidity Ratio trapped-dealer table, and the temporal/relativistic field vocabulary (SoI/SoT/SoR, Lorentz factor, Tachyonic flag).

entries.title: Dealer Watermark (PDSL)
entries.description: Focal dealer strikes — peak Inventory Distribution × Dealer Premium Time, weighted by adjacency to spot — shown as latent resistance/support levels on the Heat Map.

entries.title: Deep Strike Analysis — Close Reading & Pre-Session Blueprint
entries.description: The four-signal Time State Compass close-reading protocol and the five-layer Deep Strike Analysis that formally defines PDSL/DSC and produces the 0–10 Deep Strike Scorecard.

entries.title: Difference Sum (DS)
entries.description: One of the three shipped Field Study sheets — the base derivative signal computed alongside Dual Phase and SWF.

entries.title: Dual Phase
entries.description: PG/PC and PC/PG dual-phase tension — one of the three shipped Field Study sheets, also used by ZN Timestate.

entries.title: Fibonacci Strike Architecture
entries.description: Fibonacci levels drawn PDSL-to-PDSL rather than swing-high-to-low — the level table, quarter-level microstructure, and the cascading extension rule.

entries.title: Field Notes on the Qu'an — Practitioner Observations
entries.description: Ten cross-cutting observations offered as "lenses, not procedures" — Mass-Jerk coupling, the forward-reading negative arc, entropy as an honest signal, and the pending order as a structural claim.

entries.title: Information Field & Dealer-Basis Risk Engine (Apex Dealer Logic Book, Section III)
entries.description: Distributional observables across Intent/Transaction/Realization, the Composite Dealer Score, Trigger Pull gate, and the dealer-basis VaR engine — a separate risk system from the five-dimension Risq framework.

entries.title: INTENTUM — The Phenomenology of Will
entries.description: A philosophical framework (Brentano through Whitehead) for what makes a Mission Brief genuinely "intended" rather than a functional document — culminating in a four-grade self-diagnostic scale for the quality of an entry.

entries.title: Observational Flow Frames & Quick Reference (Apex Dealer Logic Book, Sections IV–VII)
entries.description: The structured pre-session/intraday/execution checklists, the 25 essential analytical questions, the regime classification matrix, and the Twelve Axioms of Dealer Logic.

entries.title: Polynomial Skew Framework
entries.description: Fitting a 2nd-6th order polynomial to Pressure Curvature across the Chronometer Watch axis — each order maps to a distinct market-structural phenomenon.

entries.title: PRAQ — Mission Discipline (IPS, OPORD, AAR, Field Intelligence Log)
entries.description: The military-derived operational discipline layer — Strategist/Ground-Lead role separation, the four-layer Intelligence Preparation of the Session, the five-paragraph Mission Brief (OPORD), After-Action Review, and the Field Intelligence Log.

entries.title: PRAQ — Three-Body Stability, Selection Standard & Battle Rhythm
entries.description: The Self/Market/Framework stability check, the four-domain Daily Selection Audit gating whether to trade at all, the daily/weekly/monthly battle rhythm, and the eight-document Practitioner's Dossier.

entries.title: Pre-Session Checklist — Full Integration Protocol
entries.description: The eight-phase sequence tying the close reading, Deep Strike Analysis, Fibonacci architecture, conductance gate, and order construction into one ordered pre-session routine (45–75 minutes).

entries.title: Risq — The Five-Dimension Risk Framework (base formulas)
entries.description: The authoritative Risq ontology, the five risk dimensions with formulas and thresholds, and the Risq Ratio — the unified structural edge-to-risk measure that drives position sizing.

entries.title: Risq Operational Protocol
entries.description: The Risq Surface (risk as CW×Fibonacci geometry), the Entropy Budget (session information capital), the temporal risk profile across the CW arc, coherence misalignment detection, the three inertia risks, and the pre-/intra-session Risq Protocol.

entries.title: SOP-Chirality Combined Execution Protocol
entries.description: The four SOP×Chirality configurations and how each modifies position sizing, stop architecture, and the five-dimension Risq weighting.

entries.title: SOP — Superposition of Pressure
entries.description: The wave-mechanics-derived reading of how Pressure Gradient and Pressure Curvature interact — SOPG/SOPC, dominance ratios, Product Tension, Latent Motion, and the live-session checkpoint protocol.

entries.title: Statewave Fingerprint (SWF)
entries.description: The DIPLTRPD/SOPPM ratio series — one of the three shipped Field Study sheets, read as an evolving temporal signature.

entries.title: Stop Architecture & Loss Management
entries.description: Quarter-level stop placement by layer type, the three-stage loss escalation protocol, and the single-re-entry-per-PDSL rule.

entries.title: Strike Observable Manifold (Columns W–AM)
entries.description: The 13-column spatial observable set — Kurt, Skew, ICF, vol-surface derivatives, Mass, Force, Speed, Lag, Acceleration, Jerk — read relationally across the strike ladder.

entries.title: Three-Layer Execution Model — Layers A/B/C, μ-Wave, and Order Sequencing
entries.description: The market-maker-emulation position build (Layer A/B/C), the micro Elliott Wave confirmation vocabulary that triggers Layer B, and the CW-indexed pending-order sequencing protocol.

entries.title: Time State Compass — Conductance Derivative Architecture
entries.description: The toroidal-fold column architecture (Conductance, Pairs Multiplied/Divided, Sum of Pairs, DIPLTR, ratio suite, Dual Phase) that Field Study's shipped DS/Dual Phase/SWF visualization is drawn from.

entries.title: Time State Compass — Interior Structure
entries.description: The toroidal topology, chirality, entropy-loading, pilot-wave, and Jensen's-Gap readings of the Compass, and how each revises the five-dimension Risq risk framework.

entries.title: Client Warehouse
entries.description: The STORE[inst].sess[date] cache that feeds every tab and the heatmap iframe.

entries.title: Data Plane (Cloudflare)
entries.description: Pages Functions plus standalone Workers, backed by R2, D1, KV, and Supabase.

entries.title: Instrument Registry
entries.description: Single source of truth for instrument symbol knowledge — roots, contract parsing, multipliers, families.

entries.title: Presentation Layer
entries.description: Static Pages app — one classic script per feature, wired only by window globals and CustomEvents.

entries.title: Pyodide Engines
entries.description: Four intentionally-diverged in-browser Python engine copies, one per consumer; do not merge.

entries.title: Tick Engine (planned)
entries.description: The planned canonical market-data subsystem — one Tradovate MD subscription per contract, fanned out internally to Chronometer, Analytics, Execution, and Risk.

entries.title: Tradovate Market Data API — Capability Inventory
entries.description: What the Tradovate WebSocket market-data API actually exposes, compiled from official docs before designing the Tick Engine against it.

entries.title: Terminal Invariants
entries.description: The frozen constraints that must hold across any change to the terminal.

entries.title: Tick Engine Cost & Licensing Constraints
entries.description: The cost, licensing, and rate-limit rules that must govern the planned Tick Engine's design and build order.

entries.title: Production-Hardening Audit Ledger (D1–D12)
entries.description: The twelve defects found in the hardening audit, with root causes and dispositions.

entries.title: Pyodide NaN/JSON Nulling
entries.description: Bare NaN/Infinity from Python json.dumps makes JS JSON.parse reject the whole brief.

entries.title: Ingest Lifecycle
entries.description: The canonical path from Barchart CSVs in Google Drive to a published client brief.

entries.title: Visual Corpus & Reference-Text Ingestion
entries.description: How the wiki abstracts trading and risk methodology from daily Bookmap/Heat Map/Field Study screenshots plus reference text, rather than from code alone.

entries.title: Bookmap Research Environment (planned)
entries.description: The full vision for the Bookmap module as an institutional research environment — session isolation, liquidity layering, event detection, inspection tools. Mostly not yet built.

entries.title: Chronometric Heatmap Engine — Full Vision (partially shipped)
entries.description: The complete temporal-field visualization spec for the Bookmap — a multi-sheet dropdown, event/intersection detection, cross-sheet correlation, and publication integration. Only the event-highlight bands are shipped.

entries.title: Price Tab Annotation & Drawing Framework (planned)
entries.description: Persistent annotations, drawing tools, cursor modes, and a layer manager for the Chart tab — not yet built.

entries.title: Rolling Analysis Engine — Full Vision (partially shipped)
entries.description: The complete forward dealer-interest term-structure spec — core aggregation/weighting/heuristics are shipped; Bookmap integration, expiration-curve visualization, rolling reporting, and historical replay are not.

entries.title: Universal Screenshot Capture (planned)
entries.description: A reusable "capture current visualization" service every analytical tab can register with, for publication-quality exports — not yet built.

entries.title: Go-Live Runbook (Trial Seats)
entries.description: The ordered external-configuration checklist to take the terminal from code-ready to a paid trial a stranger can sign up for.

entries.title: SaaS Tiers & Gating
entries.description: Cloudflare Pages + Stripe + Supabase; four subscription tiers behind a hard paywall.

entries.title: Bookmap Layers
entries.description: Chart-tab multi-view scalar/spectral heatmap plus chronometric temporal-field overlays.

entries.title: CBOE Proxy
entries.description: Adapts CBOE quotedata into the golden-reference frame via put-call (no-premium) logic.

entries.title: Payload Generator
entries.description: Shadow-DOM payload generation with its own diverged Pyodide engine copy.

entries.title: ZN Timestate
entries.description: Standalone terminal for Promissory Notes — golden-reference derivative stack vs a Chronometer Watch.

entries.title: Qu'an Terminal — Overview
entries.description: A static, in-browser dealer-positioning options/futures terminal with a header hub and a tab strip.

entries.title: Account Sim Tab
entries.description: Position/risk simulation against the loaded dealer structure.

entries.title: Chart Tab
entries.description: Live price chart with Bookmap-style scalar/spectral and chronometric layers.

entries.title: Compass Tab
entries.description: Compass view of the selected session's dealer structure.

entries.title: Detector Tab
entries.description: The default tab — intermarket breach detection over the loaded option chains.

entries.title: Execution Tab
entries.description: Per-user Tradovate execution cockpit; subscribers are demo-clamped, only the operator can route live.

entries.title: Field Study Tab
entries.description: Polar / SOP field view of dealer structure for the selected session.

entries.title: Heat Map Tab
entries.description: Strike-field heat map; a standalone iframe document with its own Pyodide engine.

entries.title: Report — Chronometric Field Brief
entries.description: The computed brief; auto-archived, publishable to client links or the blog.

entries.title: Rolling Tab
entries.description: The Rolling Analysis Engine — forward dealer-interest term structure across expirations.

entries.title: Strike Field Tab
entries.description: Strike-field scalar view; hosts the Strike Compass.
